title: The Plateau Is Reshaped
description: Pages 11–13 focus on the plateau is reshaped, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as pica's giant stone body reshapes Dressrosa, scattering the fighters and forcing Luffy's group to race toward Doflamingo.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Plaze outside the house of toys.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Straw hat and the others' bodies are nowhere to be found!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Either they were crushed beyond Rec- Ognition....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...or they were sent flying some- where else!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: If they still live, let me know.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I won't let them reach dofi...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Ahh... there's a person emerging from beyond the smoke...!! No... a bull?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We've found you now!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's straw hat!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Looks like they were blasted off and came straight back!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: He's riding a bull!! All three of them are here! No...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: UAASH!!! They've grown in number!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: They've come back with a whole parade of vicious warriors in tow!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I'll be the one to take Doflamin- go's head!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I'll do it if I have to slice all of you down first!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: No, I'll take him down!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Where did they suddenly get all these allies?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: and such a notorious lot, as well....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: They can bring three or three hundred!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: It makes no differ- once!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Hass- Houken Ougi!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: KING punch!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Kiri- KUG!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: It may not be fully charged just yet, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: "Light version" !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Ahh...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: Guahh!! Pica- Sama's Hand!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Stop follow- ing me already!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Shaddup, ya damn Saviour!!

summary: The Plateau Is Reshaped develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
